CustomField.description: SAL26-1343- Replaced Subscription_Term__c with SBQQ__ProrateMultiplier__c of Contract line object
CustomField.formula: IF(RenewedContractLine__c <> null,((IF(OR(TEXT(Product__r.SBQQSC__EntitlementConversion__c) = 'One per unit' , TEXT(Product__r.SBQQSC__EntitlementConversion__c) = 'One per quote line'), ((RenewedContractLine__r.Total_Price_Without_Promo__c/RenewedContractLine__r.SBQQSC__Quantity__c)* Quantity__c),RenewedContractLine__r.Total_Price_Without_Promo__c) / (RenewedContractLine__r.SBQQSC__ProrateMultiplier__c/ Product__r.SBQQ__SubscriptionTerm__c) / Product__r.SBQQ__SubscriptionTerm__c) * 12),null)
CustomField.label: Renewal Target Amount (RTA)
